name: Document Title
purpose: The main title at the very top of the first page (e.g., 'NOTICE OF CLAIM').

name: Caption
purpose: The party names and their roles (Claimant vs. Respondent), usually enclosed in a box or separated by lines.

name: Addressee Block
purpose: The 'TO:' section identifying the government entities, municipalities, or agencies being served with the notice, including their addresses.

name: Introductory Notice
purpose: The introductory text stating 'PLEASE TAKE NOTICE that the undersigned claimant hereby makes claim...', appearing before the numbered or specific claim details.

name: Claimant and Attorney Information
purpose: The section or numbered paragraph detailing the name, address, and contact information of the claimant and their legal representation.

name: Nature of Claim
purpose: The section or numbered paragraph describing the type of action or claim (e.g., personal injury, trip and fall, negligence).

name: Time, Place, and Manner
purpose: The section or numbered paragraph detailing the exact date, time, location, how the incident occurred, and all specific allegations of negligence, liability, and actual or constructive notice.

name: Damages and Injuries
purpose: The section or numbered paragraph describing the bodily injuries, medical expenses, pain and suffering, and other damages sustained by the claimant.

name: Demand and Intent to Sue
purpose: The text stating the total amount claimed, the presentation of the claim for adjustment, and the claimant's intent to commence an action if the claim is not paid.

name: Attachments List
purpose: The list of attached documents, such as photographs or verification pages, appearing at the end of the main notice text.

name: Date
purpose: The date the main notice of claim was signed or executed, appearing before the main signature block.

name: Signature Block
purpose: The signature line, printed name, and contact information of the attorney or claimant signing the main notice of claim.

name: Verification Heading
purpose: The title indicating the start of the verification section (e.g., 'VERIFICATION' or 'ATTORNEY'S VERIFICATION').

name: Verification Venue and Body
purpose: The State and County venue block (e.g., 'STATE OF NEW YORK...') and the sworn statement affirming the truth of the document's contents.

name: Verification Date and Signature
purpose: The date and signature block for the individual (claimant or attorney) swearing to the verification.

name: Litigation Backer
purpose: The cover page or backer at the very end of the document, containing the repeated caption, document title, attorney information, and any service, entry, or settlement notices.
